official_site_search_notes: Official Ashby posting found directly for Interra Health Senior Data Analyst; search result crawled yesterday and page is live.
validation_notes: Rejected 2026-04-30: official Ashby page appears live, but no true posting date was exposed; search-result crawl freshness is not accepted as proof that the job was posted within 60 days.
job_description:
# Senior Data Analyst
Company: Interra Health
Source: Official company posting via Ashby
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
URL: https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/Interrahealth/b88cf818-bd5a-428b-98b5-49ecddf9fd46

## Highlights
- Remote US senior data analyst role at a healthcare technology company formed from DoseSpot, Arrive Health, and pVerify.
- Healthcare domain includes eligibility, real-time coverage and pricing insights, prescribing tools, pharmacy transparency, and connected care.
- Focused on data and analytics within software and healthcare operations.
strengths: Strong healthcare technology fit with eligibility, coverage, pricing, and connected-care data.
Remote full-time role aligned with SQL analytics, reporting, and data quality positioning.
Eligibility and coverage themes map well to payer/member/provider data experience.
gaps: Posting details available in search extract are limited; confirm exact SQL/BI/tool requirements before applying.
Senior title may ask for broader analytics ownership than base resume emphasizes.
notes: Apply first/if time. Tailor toward eligibility, payer data, SQL reporting, data quality, coverage/pricing analytics, and cross-functional healthcare insights.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Senior Healthcare Data Analyst | Eligibility & Coverage Analytics | SQL Data Quality
